examples: This past week, a plumber completed work at my residence.
At the age of 74, he is still going strong as the oldest plumber in business in Boise, Idaho.
In my view, it is just as great an achievement to be a plumber or a bricklayer as it is to be a lawyer or a doctor.
If your toilet stops working in the next few days, blame the sun, not your plumber.
All of their positions will now be held by man named Joe the Plumber.
